rationale: Review 1's finding correctly identifies sqrtTower_sq_mem (public, line 127) as unused in the diff (its exact body is inlined instead at squareClass_of_sq_mem:162 and nowhere called); privatizing/removing it yields a meaningfully smaller public API. Review 2's claim that 'helpers stay private' is false against the same diff, so acting on #1 produces the cleaner result.
